[DQC.US.0046.9279] The element NetIncomeLoss (Net Income Loss) should not be included as a total of OtherComprehensiveIncomeLossNetOfTax, OtherComprehensiveIncomeLossBeforeTax, OtherComprehensiveIncomeLossNetOfTaxPortionAttributableToParent, OtherComprehensiveIncomeLossBeforeTaxPortionAttributableToParent. The OCI element represents Other Comprehensive Income and should be aggregated with NetIncome Loss to derive the value of Comprehensive Income. Please remove Net Income Loss from the calculation, or change the total to be a Comprehensive Income element such as ComprehensiveIncomeNetOfTaxIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest. (Comprehensive Income (Loss), Net of Tax, Including Portion Attributable to Noncontrolling Interest)
